accurate.why: Accurately enumerates the appropriations accounts and agencies funded by the bill.

no_hallucinations.why: All listed accounts (WIFIA, SPR, ARPA-E, etc.) appear in the text.

changes_to_existing_law.why: High-level account list; does not detail amendments but notes restrictions generally.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the bill sets requirements and restrictions on fund use.

effective_dates.why: Omits dates; acceptable for high-level appropriations summary.

major_provisions_covered.why: Comprehensively lists the funded accounts and agencies.

coherent.why: Organized as a structured account list.

concise.why: List form is appropriate, no filler.

correct_entities.why: Corps, Reclamation, DOE, FERC, NRC and all accounts named correctly.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
